events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario. Task: identify safety hazards, severity, immediate controls. Setting manufacturing/assembly floor, in-progress. Observed field condition: open-ended find all hazards in jobsite photo item - cords across walkways, missing guardrails, blocked egress/extinguishers, improvised scaffolds, unattended open holes. Work actively in progress. Reference OSHA general duty, 1926 Subpart L.

Need output JSON with fields. Decision must be fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Risk likely critical due to multiple serious hazards: fall, electrical, fire/egress. Work_stage in-progress. Component_conditions: installed-defective? non-compliant? maybe worn/degraded/failed not necessarily. Use installed-defective and non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 100? The hazard recognition task is in-progress; overall work? Could be 50. But percent_complete numeric estimate of overall progress of work under review. Since actively in progress, maybe 60. value 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. confidence high 0.95. event_time 0. rate 0. order empty. workable empty. findings list hazards. actions immediate controls. references.

Need ensure valid JSON. No prose. Let's craft.

Findings: electrical cords across walkways create trip/shock hazard; missing guardrails at elevated edges/open holes create fall hazard; blocked egress routes and fire extinguishers impede emergency evacuation and fire response; improvised scaffolds non-compliant with Subpart L create collapse/fall hazard; unattended open holes create fall hazard.

Actions: reroute/elevate/protect cords with covers; install guardrails/covers/barricades at openings and edges; clear egress paths and access to extinguishers; remove/tag out improvised scaffolds and erect compliant scaffold per 1926 Subpart L; post signs/barriers and cover open holes; conduct site safety sweep and retrain workers.

References: OSHA General Duty Clause, 29 CFR 1926 Subpart L (scaffolds), 1910.37/1910.303? Since manufacturing floor maybe 1910, but reference says apply OSHA general duty and 1926 Subpart L. Could include 29 CFR 1926.451 scaffold requirements, 1926.1053 stairways/ladders? Actually missing guardrails/open holes 1926 Subpart M fall protection. But reference only general duty and Subpart L. We can mention OSHA General Duty Clause; 29 CFR 1926 Subpart L (scaffolds). Also maybe 1910.36/37 egress, 1910.303 electrical. But to be safe include only provided references and maybe relevant OSHA standards.

Need JSON exactly. Ensure no trailing commas.
